article_title: Claude Code 进阶用法：.NET 项目里最值得落地的 20 个习惯
core_theme: 面向 .NET 开发者的 Claude Code 进阶工作流：验证循环、上下文管理、hooks、MCP/Roslyn、worktrees 和模型选择
reader_takeaway: 读者能把 Claude Code 从聊天式助手调整成可验证、可约束、可扩展的开发协作者
summary_angle: 高级用法的核心不是提示词花样，而是控制：给它可运行的检查、干净的上下文、确定性的自动化和 .NET 语义工具

information_blocks.source_anchor: Tip 1: Give Claude a check it can run itself; run dotnet build and dotnet test after each change
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧循环箭头、清单和通过标记，表示构建和测试形成闭环

information_blocks.source_anchor: Tips 5-8: /clear, /context, compact early, keep CLAUDE.md lean
information_blocks.visual_idea: 上下文文件、清理工具和 CLAUDE.md 文件夹，表示主动管理上下文预算

information_blocks.source_anchor: Tips 9-11: permissions block, PostToolUse hook, commit-time gate
information_blocks.visual_idea: 安全钩子、检查清单和闸门，表示确定性的格式化和提交前验证

information_blocks.source_anchor: Tips 14-20: Roslyn MCP, Context7, type-aware prompts, worktrees, headless runs, model selection
information_blocks.visual_idea: MCP 网络、语义导航、分支文件夹和模型节点，表示 .NET 感知与并行扩展

main_metaphor: 开发者坐在控制台前，把 Claude Code 的工作流接入四道可控检查点
primary_subject: 中心的虚构开发控制台和一个抽象 AI 助手图标
subject_action: 控制台把任务依次路由到验证、上下文、Hooks 和 MCP 四个区域
composition: 2.35:1 宽幅，居中控制台，四个信息块围绕主屏幕，左到右形成工作流
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: American cartoon illustration, elastic shapes, clear expressions, bold color fields, light comedic timing
selected_style_reason: 随机选中；清晰的卡通分区适合把 20 条建议压缩成四个可读工作流节点
style_safety_note: 该风格不指向特定品牌、工作室或在世艺术家，prompt 使用非仿冒描述词
avoid: 真实 Claude UI 截图
draft_goal: 验证四个源自文章的实践节点是否能在单张宽封面里读出来
revision_targets: 如果像真实产品 UI，改成更抽象的控制台插画
如果标签太多，压缩到四个主标签
如果 MCP 区域像假架构图，改为抽象语义网络
final_prompt: Use case: infographic-story. Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article. Theme: turning Claude Code from a chat box into a controlled .NET development teammate through verification loops, context hygiene, hooks, MCP/Roslyn, worktrees, and model selection. Keep one central fictional workstation console and four supporting beats: 验证/1, 上下文/2, Hooks/3, MCP/4. Base style: editorial technical illustration. Selected style descriptor: American cartoon illustration, elastic shapes, clear expressions, bold color fields, light comedic timing. Wide 2.35:1 cover. Avoid real UI screenshots, fake terminals, fake dashboards, fake charts, fabricated metrics, long text, slogans, and watermark.
